actions.text: /grill-me I want to build a URL shortener
agy asks targeted questions before writing any code

actions.cmd: echo 'Q1: Technology stack? → Python + FastAPI + SQLite'
echo 'Q2: Slug generation? → Secure Random Token (Base62)'
echo 'Q3: UI type? → Interactive Web UI + JSON API'
echo 'Q4: Features? → Click tracking + TTL + QR codes'

actions.text: After 5 questions: full design alignment, then builds everything

actions.cmd: echo '✓ Built: FastAPI app + glassmorphic UI + 8 tests passing'
